{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Queen’s Gift
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Queen’s Gift]] is a condensed gem and one of the few Divine Treasures of [[royal madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Queen’s Gift]] is a crystallized command that allows others to borrow the [[Luminous Queen]]'s political and conceptual authority.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
